title: Farmer's Cutting: Cinderscapes
description: Adds Farmer's Delight cutting recipes for Cinderscapes
body:
Adds more [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) cutting board recipes for [Cinderscapes](https://modrinth.com/mod/cinderscapes)

- Bark, stripping, recycling for all wood types
- All quartz types can be broken down from blocks into their respective quartz

![Wood Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dZSS54kS/images/c05cbcc3b4653e7d99395623880d24a1b5cd1c01.png)![Quartz Breakdown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dZSS54kS/images/5e34b1e64e1ecbe5b789948248d0fb589231641c.png)
